tweets:
🔥 2026 = Year of the Red Horse (병오, Byeong-O) in Korean astrology. Yang Fire on Yang Fire — only happens once every 60 years. Last time was 1966.

Forecast for all 12 zodiac signs ↓

1/ Red Horse energy = visibility, speed, romance, burnout risk.

Industries that thrive: media, broadcasting, hospitality, energy.
Industries that struggle: heavy manufacturing, long-cycle research.

2/ The 3 luckiest signs in 2026:

🐯 Tiger — three-harmony Fire, career breakthroughs, viral moments
🐉 Dragon — partnerships thrive, public profile rises
🐑 Goat — Six Combination with Horse, romance/marriage/family expansion

3/ The 3 most disrupted signs in 2026:

🐭 Rat — direct clash with Horse, expect a major life pivot
🐂 Ox — friction in family/partnerships, but career recognition
🐍 Snake — fast advancement BUT cardiovascular/sleep risk

4/ Universal advice for the Red Horse year:

• Ship and publish — the year rewards visibility
• Protect your sleep — Yang Fire on Yang Fire burns through circadian rhythm
• Use Nov–Dec to plan 2027
• Wear red on big-decision days
5/ Important: the Korean year change is at Ipchun (입춘) — Feb 4, 2026. Births before that count as Wood Snake (Eul-Sa), not Red Horse.
